auth.welcomeBody: A private guide for understanding each other better, growing closer, and staying more in sync.
auth.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account, then sign in.
auth.authError: That didn't work. Check your email and password.
auth.localOnly: Using Mend without an account. Everything stays on this phone.

settings.title: Settings
settings.languageNote: Guides, card decks, and session content are English-only for now. Translations are on the way.
settings.aboutBody: Mend helps two people communicate, understand each other, and build more connection. It is an educational tool, not therapy; it never diagnoses or replaces a licensed relationship therapist. If there is violence, fear, or control, guided conversations are not the safe tool. Free, private, and built to support your relationship without creating dependence.

journey.title: Your journey
journey.subtitle: A staged path toward more connection, understanding, and alignment.
journey.graduated: You built something real. Keep going.
journey.designedToEnd: Use Mend for the conversations and habits that help you stay connected.
